summary: Diff implements heading levels (H1/H2) across backend schema, frontend editor controls, rendering, markdown export, and includes a backend migration to preserve old data. Some additional unrelated changes (auth hook behavior, global CSS typography/prose styling, and project metadata file) appear beyond the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Added project metadata/tracking file not requested (project_state.json with AR-* items).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention adding project state/feature request tracking files.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified actor/identity hook behavior to invalidate/refetch queries when actor changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest scope is WYSIWYG heading controls and related rich-text schema/render/export; query invalidation/refetch behavior changes are not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Broader Internet Identity provider/auth-client option changes (e.g., idleOptions defaults, derivationOrigin wiring).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists auth changes as non-goals beyond Internet Identity; these modifications are not required for heading controls.

hallucinated_features.description: Extensive global typography/prose CSS styling adjustments beyond just ensuring headings render as h1/h2.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 requires correct HTML tags/styling based on level, but the diff introduces broad styling changes across multiple elements that are not explicitly requested.
